title: "My Work" overview Widget for Android devices

posts.author: Marlier (Marlier Monday)
posts.cookedHtml:
Android devices allow the use of Widgets, which are effectively ways to view data in an app without having to open the app itself.

It would be massively useful to have a Widget for the Monday app, which shows work assigned to your account, so at a glance of your phone/tablet screen, you can see your upcoming tasks.

At the moment the only widget shows the most recently interacted with boards etc in Monday (which isn’t much more useful than opening the app itself).

Google Tasks, TickTick etc have something implemented for this and it makes checking tasks while on the move really easy.
